title: Next odškrtne zdrojovou todo
goal: mini next --apply gets an optional --from-todo <n> flag that, after saving the phase, ticks off that item in .mini/todo.md; the mini context next / slash-command instructions guide Claude to pass <n> when the idea came from the archive. Out-of-range or already-done items are handled with a warning, not a crash. Verifiable via tests.

steps.title: todoStore: helper markTodoDone(n)
steps.detail: New function in todoStore.ts that ticks off an item by 1-based index (over all items); returns 'ticked' | 'out-of-range' | 'already-done' | 'no-todos' plus the item text. Reuses read/writeTodos. Covered by a unit test.

steps.title: next --apply --from-todo <n> flag
steps.detail: Add --from-todo <n> option to the next command, threaded into applyNewPhase; after saving the phase it calls markTodoDone, and an out-of-range / already-done index only warns (log.warn), never crashes. Test in next.test.ts.

steps.title: Backlog block shows archive numbers + instruction
steps.detail: openTodos carries its 1-based archive position, rendered as '- [n] text'; the prompt guides Claude to pass --from-todo <n> when the phase comes from the backlog. Update context.ts + buildNextSessionPrompt and sessionContext.test.ts.

steps.title: Docs + snapshots
steps.detail: Document --from-todo in docs/non-interactive/next.md (and cross-reference in todo.md); refresh the affected snapshots/tests.
